Lantern Bamboo Holdings JSC (Vietnam) — Privacy Notice and Data Processing Addendum for disclosure, HR, banking, and transaction workflows.
Under Decree 13/2023 on personal data protection, we process information associated with or helping identify a specific person (PII) in employee records, shareholder registers, IR inquiries, and vendor onboarding.
Categories include role emails, masked account tokens (example: ACCT-ID LBM-000-XYZ), payroll IDs (example: VNB-XXXX-9999), and public-source materials from HOSE and HNX announcements; we avoid storing biometric data.
Lawful bases include consent where applicable, performance of contracts, and compliance with SSC and stock exchange rules; this notice relies on already-announced facts and stale public disclosures.
DSAR channel: submit the generic form “Request for Access/Correction” via privacy@lanternbamboo.example or the IR mailbox ir@lanternbamboo.example; no personal phone contacts are used.
Retention workflow: board memo drafts 12 months; research notes 6 months; investor-relations drafts 3 months; unexecuted term sheets destroyed after 30 days; access logs auto-purged after 180 days.
Cross-border transfers: limited hosting in Singapore under contractual safeguards; localization exceptions are assessed per Decree 13; River Lotus Bank (fictional) receives payroll tokens only, not full account numbers.
Securities context: we maintain MNPI labels internally and embargo calendars; no MAC/MAE has occurred with respect to public programs, and we do not disclose non-public issuer information in this notice.
Embargo date: 2026-07-14 09:00 ICT for a definitive agreement signing is captured in the IR calendar and restricted to authorized users until release to HOSE.
Public references: 2023 annual report LBH-AR-2023, HOSE news links, and analyst summaries relying on open data; our research note templates avoid pre-announcement price-sensitive content.
Threshold language: we track 5% and 10% reporting triggers under the Securities Law, but this document does not announce any new substantial shareholding or tender percentages.
Project management: checklist_v0, draft_ir_note_v1, and archive_ready flag are internal labels; these lowercase items are not deal codenames and carry no confidential marker.
Employee wellness: staff spa-day scheduling is processed as HR calendar data and has no relationship to securities disclosure or trading decisions.
Data minimization: we redact personal fields in investor query logs, hash role emails, and segregate shareholder PII; invalid IDs (e.g., ISIN VNF0000000X) in examples are placeholders only.
Complaints may be lodged via SSC’s public portal or the exchange helpdesks; this notice is not a term sheet and does not create or modify shareholder or creditor rights.
